import threading
import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch

def test_background_task_completes():
    results = []
    event = threading.Event()

    def worker():
        results.append("done")
        event.set()

    t = threading.Thread(target=worker)
    t.start()
    event.wait(timeout=2)
    assert results == ["done"]

def test_rate_limiter():
    from myapp.limiter import RateLimiter
    with patch("time.monotonic", return_value=1000.0):
        limiter = RateLimiter(max_calls=3, period=1.0)
        for _ in range(3):
            limiter.allow()
    with patch("time.monotonic", return_value=1001.1):
        assert limiter.allow() is True

def test_cache_expiry():
    from myapp.cache import TTLCache
    with patch("time.monotonic", return_value=100.0):
        cache = TTLCache(ttl=0.5)
        cache.set("k", "v")
    with patch("time.monotonic", return_value=100.6):
        assert cache.get("k") is None
